skill_availability_goal: Verify bounded feature-mode API synchronization from confirmed process context and current code/test facts.
prompt: 按 `pm-handoff.md` 已确认的 feature delivery 范围执行正式文档同步。维护者已确认本批只处理 `src/api/search.py`、`src/api/schemas.py` 与命中的 `docs/site/api/search.md`；请从 fixture 代码、测试和 diff 核证后写入，并合并 change-map。
